name: playbook-forge
description: Genera playbooks HTML branded v6 con pipeline 3-capas deterministico: specs + templates + engine. Dual-mode: ecosystem (P0-P13) + forensic (assessment). 13 flujos AI-native, 5 katas (Shu-Ha-Ri), 65+ modals interactivos, contenido bilingue ES/EN, 13 anti-patrones, glosario, perfiles de manager, adopcion progresiva, VR-AID, semaforo de valor. 38 gates automatizados, copyable prompts con EXITO criteria, Google Calendar auto-deploy links. Sofka DS v5.1.
